note: LLM verification sweep: re-verify every DONE TU vs the X360 ARTIST asm, fix real divergences, commit high-confidence fixes. One entry per TU under tus{}.

legend.pending: not yet verified -- the work queue
legend.pass: verified accurate vs asm, no fix needed (high confidence)
legend.fixed: had asm-confirmed divergence(s); fixed + fresh-eyes re-verified PASS/high; committed
legend.flagged: confirmed divergence but fix needs a CROSS-TU / shared-header change (not applied in-TU); see note
legend.conductor_fix: confirmed divergence whose fix lives in another TU / vendor lib; do it directly, not via an in-TU agent; see note
legend.not_reconstructed: ledger says done but the committed file does NOT contain the TUs functions (wrong/absent body) -- needs a FULL re-decompile, not a verify; see note
legend.fix_unverified: a fix was applied but the re-verify agent did not confirm it -- re-verify or revert
legend.in_wave: currently being processed by a wave (reset to pending if that wave died)

fields.dir: parent dir (used to keep <=1 TU/dir per wave)
fields.wave: wave number that last touched it

summary.still_unmapped_note: done TUs (mostly mangled template class: ids) whose bodies could not be mapped to a committed file; audit separately
